_comment_: Railpack config — opt-in customization for the default Railway builder. Most projects work without this file: Railpack auto-detects providers and builds. Add this only when (a) you need to force a specific provider, (b) you want custom install/build steps, (c) you need a specific runtime base image. Override file path via RAILPACK_CONFIG_FILE env var.

deploy._comment_about_base_: Pin the runtime base for reproducibility. node:22-slim is small and supported.
